title.en: Implants for surgery - Metallic materials - Part 1: Wrought stainless steel
title.zh: 外科植入物 - 金属材料 - 第1部分：锻造不锈钢

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for wrought stainless steel used in the manufacture of surgical implants.
standards.scope: Implants for surgery -- Metallic materials -- Wrought stainless steel.

standards.scope: Implants for surgery -- Metallic materials -- Wrought titanium 6-aluminium 4-vanadium alloy.

title.en: Cardiovascular implants - Cardiac valve prostheses - Part 1: General requirements
title.zh: 心血管植入物 - 心脏瓣膜假体 - 第1部分：通用要求

standards.abstract: Specifies general requirements for cardiac valve prostheses and components for surgical and transcatheter implantation.
standards.scope: Cardiovascular implants -- Cardiac valve prostheses -- General requirements.

title.en: Implants for surgery - Active implantable medical devices - Part 1: General requirements for safety, marking and for information to be provided by the manufacturer

standards.scope: Implants for surgery -- Active implantable medical devices -- General requirements for safety, marking and for information to be provided by the manufacturer.

title.en: Standard Specification for Knee Replacement Prosthesis
title.zh: 标准规范 - 膝关节置换假体

standards.note: Withdrawn in 2023. No direct replacement designated by ASTM. For knee implant testing, refer to ISO 21536 (harmonised under EU MDR) and ASTM F3334.
standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for materials, design, and performance of knee replacement prostheses.
standards.scope: Standard specification for knee replacement prosthesis.

title.en: Standard Specification for Hip Joint Replacement Bearing Surfaces
title.zh: 标准规范 - 髋关节置换假体承载表面

standards.abstract: Covers the design and dimensional requirements for metallic, ceramic, and polymeric mating bearing surfaces used in total hip joint prostheses and hip endoprostheses.
standards.scope: Standard specification for hip joint replacement bearing surfaces made of metallic, ceramic, and polymeric materials.
